zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah MacKenzie於1388年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，她的父親Kenneth Mackenzie23歲，母親Mackenzie Stewart18歲。她於1404年與Thomas Hall IV在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1426年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾沃里克享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah MacKenzie于1388年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，她的父亲Kenneth Mackenzie23岁，母亲Mackenzie Stewart18岁。她于1404年与Thomas Hall IV在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1426年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾沃里克享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacKenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah MacKenzie was born in 1388, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Kenneth Mackenzie, was 23 and her mother, Mackenzie Stewart, was 18. She married Thomas Hall IV in 1404, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1426, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

Elle a épousé Thomas Hall IV en 1404, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1426, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah MacKenzie(이)가 1388년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Kenneth Mackenzie(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mackenzie Stewart(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 Thomas Hall IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah MacKenzie родилась в 1388 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Kenneth Mackenzie было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mackenzie Stewart, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hall IV в 1404 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1426 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
